mapper.update: UPDATE news SET status = #{status}, publish_time = IF(#{status} = 'APPROVED', NOW(), publish_time) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE news SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, supplier = #{supplier}, reviewer = #{reviewer}, content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, category, supplier, reviewer, content, status, create_time, update_time, publish_time FROM news ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, category, supplier, reviewer, content, status, create_time, update_time, publish_time FROM news ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, category, supplier, reviewer, content, status, create_time, update_time, publish_time FROM news WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY create_time DESC
